core_prompt.description: An expert AI prompt engineer specializing in designing prompt sequences for Google's Antigravity EDI to construct professional, visually stunning, and user-friendly websites for manga series, with a focus on modern Progressive Web App (PWA) technologies.
core_prompt.objective: Interact with a user to gather essential details about their manga series and then generate a structured, multi-part prompt set. This prompt set will be used by a downstream web development AI to build a complete, professional, and feature-rich manga website from the ground up, fully realized as an installable PWA.
context_gathering: Haruka Sakura enters Furin High to reach the top, only to find the delinquents there are the town's 'Bofurin' protectors.
Shonen / Action Manga Readers / Global Gen Z
Protection, Teamwork, Urban Justice, Redemption, Community Strength
Sharp, detailed urban aesthetic with high-contrast action sequences and street-fashion influence
Asphalt Black (#121212), Neon Cyan (#00f2ff), Warning Yellow (#facc15)
Furin High Emblem, Haruka Sakura Heterochromia Portrait, Bofurin Jacket Sticker-Slap, Street Graffiti Backgrounds

prompts.objective: Define the website's universal design language and technical foundation.
prompts.task: Generate the CSS and design token configuration for a professional manga website.

instructions.Design Philosophy: Modern, clean, and immersive. The design should complement the manga's art, not compete with it. Prioritize readability and a seamless user experience.
instructions.Typography: Headings: Use a bold, impactful font that reflects the [Genre(s)]. Body Text: Use a highly readable sans-serif font like Inter or Lato.
instructions.Color Palette: Primary: [Primary Color Palette]. Background: Dark theme preferred (#1a1a1d). Text: Off-white (#F5F5F5).
instructions.UI Elements: Flat design with subtle hover effects. Use Tailwind CSS for a utility-first, mobile-first responsive layout.

prompts.objective: Create a visually striking landing page that hooks new readers and encourages app installation.
prompts.task: Design the homepage for the manga titled [Manga Title].

instructions.Header (Sticky): Left: [Logo], Center: Navigation (Home, Chapters, Characters, Settings), Right: 'Start Reading' and 'Install App' buttons. Hide on scroll down, reappear on scroll up.
instructions.Hero Section: Full-width [Main cover art] with parallax and dark gradient. Include Title, Tagline, Synopsis, and dual 'Start from Ch. 1' and 'Latest Chapter' CTAs.
instructions.Latest Release Section: Horizontal scrolling container or Grid of the most recent chapters with lazy-loaded thumbnails.
instructions.Character Introduction Section: Grid of main characters using [Character Portraits] with 3D hover effects.
instructions.Footer: Links for About Us, Contact, Privacy Policy, DMCA, Terms, Cookies, and Disclaimer. Author credits and Copyright.

prompts.objective: Provide a clear, easy-to-navigate list of all chapters with offline capabilities.

instructions.Layout: Single-column or Grid-based list of chapter cards filling full width.
instructions.Cards: Include Chapter Number, Title, Date, Thumbnail. Visually distinguish read/unread chapters.
instructions.Interactions: Subtle 3D lift and soft accent glow on hover.
instructions.Features: Searchable CHAPTER_INDEX dropdown with arc-filtering. Sort by 'Newest/Oldest First'. Save and restore scroll position.

prompts.objective: Create a modern, immersive, and high-performance 'gapless' vertical scrolling reading experience.
prompts.task: Design the manga reader UI (webtoon/long-strip style).

instructions.Layout: Continuous vertical flow with pure black background (#000000). Images must be full-screen (object-fit: contain) on mobile.
instructions.Performance: Implement image chunking, pre-loading, and lazy loading. Ensure zero white lines between image slices.
instructions.Controls (Overlay): Semi-transparent overlay on tap. Include progress bar, searchable chapter dropdown, and navigation (Prev/Next).

prompts.objective: Build a database of characters for fans to explore.

instructions.Layout: Responsive grid of character portraits linking to a detailed profile view.
instructions.Profile View: Left column (30%) high-res portrait. Right column (70%) Name, Aliases, expandable Biography, Key Relationships, First Appearance.

prompts.objective: Optimize the website for search engines and AI generative crawlers.
prompts.task: Generate SEO metadata and structured data.

instructions.AI-Snippet: Generate 150-word executive summaries for every chapter in a blockquote for GEO extraction.
instructions.Content: Use gpt-oss:120b via Ollama API with 16-key rotation to generate 1500-word tactical reports for each page.
instructions.Schema: Implement ComicSeries JSON-LD, Book schema, and BreadcrumbList. Generate dynamic sitemap.xml.

prompts.objective: Ensure the website is accessible to all users and loads quickly.
prompts.task: Implement a11y features and performance optimizations.

instructions.Accessibility: Descriptive alt text, ARIA roles, high color contrast, and full keyboard navigability.
instructions.Performance: Optimize images to AVIF format. Minify CSS/JS and implement Intersection Observer for panel loading.

prompts.objective: Configure the Web App Manifest for a native 'add to home screen' experience.

instructions.Properties: name: [Manga Title], short_name: [Manga Title], start_url: '/', display: 'standalone', theme_color: [Primary Color].

prompts.objective: Implement the core service worker for offline functionality.

instructions.Caching: Implement 'Cache First' strategy for app shell and 'Stale-While-Revalidate' for chapter images. Enable offline reading for cached chapters.

prompts.objective: Implement features to proactively engage users with new content.
prompts.task: Configure Push API and Background Sync.

instructions.Push Notifications: Request permission via System Notification UI. Notify users when new chapters are available.
instructions.Background Sync: Listen for periodicsync to check for new releases and pre-cache them automatically.

prompts.objective: Create a settings page for user control over experience and offline data.

instructions.Customization: Toggles for Theme (Light/Dark/System), Reading Mode (Vertical/Single), and Notification preferences.
instructions.Storage: Display used quota using navigator.storage. Provide 'Clear Cache' options to free up local space.
